headline: IV Equipment Market by Type, Application, End User - Global Forecast to 2031
summary: The global IV equipment market is set to reach USD 23.92 billion by 2031, expanding from USD 17.82 billion in 2026, at a CAGR of 6.1%. Growth is fueled by rising chronic disease prevalence and increasing hospitalizations, along with a shift towards home-based and outpatient care. Technological advancements such as needle-free connectors and smart infusion pumps are elevating market adoption. North America leads the market, driven by a robust healthcare infrastructure and high adoption of medical
